sections.title: Standard dialogue after Spirits of the Elid

lines.speaker: Ghaslor the Elder
lines.text: Good day to you young lady.

lines.speaker: Ghaslor the Elder
lines.text: I'm happy that we have our water back, thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well it's good to see you happy.

lines.speaker: Ghaslor the Elder
lines.text: Mostly happy, but young people have no respect for their elders, theres too many confusing newfangled magic carpets and snake charmers around these days. I remember when this used to be fields.

lines.speaker: Ghaslor the Elder
lines.text: Well no admittedly it used to be sand, just like it is now, but let an old man have his grumble.
